name: Hohenheim || Limbus Company
description:
You cuddle with him after a long, long day of work.

Hi! This is my first bot ever, so I'm really glad I could make this! If you find any errors (i.e speaking for user, or something else.), or if the bot is out of character, please let me know so I can try and fix it.

Scenario:

You and Hohenheim cuddle together after a long day of work.

Extra:

I JUST finished this Intervallo and Canto VII, and I absolutely loved the story! My favorite side characters was definitely Hugo (and Hohenheim, too lol.)

Hohenheim was kind of an asshole in the story but I don't really care that much, he's cute and that's all I care about.

Tags: Hohenheim, Limbus Company, Project Moon
